isolation.scope: Browser-only validation on localhost:3102 with 1440px viewport; no service restarts; no code changes

assertions.title: All Uniswap exact values applied

steps.action: Open localhost:3102 and set viewport to 1440x900

steps.expected: Navbar height 72px and correct dark surface
steps.observed: Header bounding box measured 1440x72; background rgb(0,0,0)

steps.action: Measure token logo and header typography
steps.expected: Logo 56px and heading typography aligned to spec
steps.observed: Logo measured 56x56; token name CASH is 25px/30px at weight 500

steps.action: Measure primary price text above chart
steps.expected: Price text at 36px with correct hierarchy
steps.observed: Price text ($--) measured 36px with 40px line-height and weight 500

steps.action: Validate stats heading and stat row layout
steps.expected: Stats heading/value sizing and row-style layout applied
steps.observed: Stats heading is 25px/30px; value text is 25px/30px; Market cap row is flex row with space-between, 50%-width row blocks, and 20px wrapper gap

steps.expected: Swap input surfaces use #1F1F1F with 16px radius
steps.observed: Swap input section background is rgb(31,31,31) (#1F1F1F) with 16px border-radius; swap card surface is rgb(19,19,19) (#131313) with 16px radius
About paragraph color measured rgb(255,255,255), size 17px with 24px line-height
Viewport, annotated, and full-page screenshots captured under evidence directory

evidence.consoleErrors: Observed: Unexpected token 'P', "Per anonym"... is not valid JSON (repeated); visual assertion remained verifiable.
evidence.network: Observed browser requests include GET / (3102), and API fetches to /depth, /market, /candles, /trades on 3100 during page load/reload.

assertions.reason: Pass: Required pixel-perfect checks in the contract were directly measured and visually confirmed at 1440px (navbar 72px, logo 56px, heading/stat 25px scale, price 36px, swap input #1F1F1F radius 16px, white description text, and correct dark surfaces).

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-FIX-001): passed based on direct browser measurements and screenshots at 1440px viewport.
